STS2_MULUNDUS-BARKSKIN.title: Barkskin
STS2_MULUNDUS-DREAD_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have a card in your exhaust pile, apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and 1 [gold]weak[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-DREAD_SLASH.title: Dread Slash
STS2_MULUNDUS-DREAD_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deals 1 additional damage for each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-DREAD_STRIKE.title: Dread Strike
STS2_MULUNDUS-ABYSSAL_JOURNEY.descriptio:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your hand.
[gold]Draw[/gold] 4 cards.
At the start of your turn, lose 1 max HP unless you are [gold]poisoned[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-ABYSSAL_JOURNEY.title: Abyssal Journey
STS2_MULUNDUS-THORN_WHIP.title: Thorn Whip
STS2_MULUNDUS-ROOT_INVASION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The enemy loses 1 strength.
STS2_MULUNDUS-ROOT_INVASION.title: Root Invasion
STS2_MULUNDUS-VERDANT_SIGHT.description:
Draw 1 card.
If you have have three cards in your Exhaust Pile, draw 1 card.
STS2_MULUNDUS-VERDANT_SIGHT.title: Verdant Sight
